description: An agent needs to configure an advertising campaign for a new movie being added to a VOD catalog, targeting specific viewer demographics.

nodes.task_description: Create a new ad campaign for the movie.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets up a new campaign in the ad management system.

nodes.task_description: Define the targeting parameters for the campaign (e.g., viewers aged 18-34 in the United States).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly sets the demographic and geographic targeting rules.

nodes.task_description: Assign ad creatives to the campaign and set the ad pods (e.g., one pre-roll, two mid-roll ads).

expected_outcome.value: Agent uploads the ad videos and configures the ad break structure.

nodes.task_description: Activate the campaign to run alongside the movie's release.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully activates the ad campaign.
